justification: All six pass criteria met: (1) Chain timeout violation identified — OrderService retry budget 3s+3s=6s exceeds CartService 5s timeout, explicitly called out. (2) Missing circuit breaker on OrderService identified as first component interaction. (3) PaymentService 8s gateway timeout > CartService 5s timeout identified as orphaned/ghost payment risk. (4) Dual-write/partial completion risk thoroughly analyzed — order created without payment captured, no compensation. (5) Saga/compensation pattern recommended multiple times with concrete alternatives. (6) Verdict is NOT READY.

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough chain-level analysis — never falls into the trap of assessing services individually
Ghost payment scenario described with concrete operational impact (customer charged, no confirmation)
Identifies additional risks beyond rubric: idempotency gaps, duplicate charges from retries, circuit breaker ordering problem
Observability review adds practical depth — explains why ghost payments would be undebuggable without correlated tracing
Concrete fix recommendations with multiple options (timeout alignment, async webhooks, saga, reorder operations)
Appropriate escalation routing to MJ for architectural gaps
